# Scaling, Deployment, and Responsible Use {#ch-scaling}

<!-- DEVELOPMENT OUTLINE: original chapter contained only its title. -->

## Time, Space, Data, and Compute

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/16-scaling-deployment-and-responsible-use.qmd#sec-pr-16-time-space-data-and-compute)
to turn **Time, Space, Data, and Compute** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Batch, Streaming, and Distributed Workflows

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/16-scaling-deployment-and-responsible-use.qmd#sec-pr-16-batch-streaming-and-distributed-workflows)
to turn **Batch, Streaming, and Distributed Workflows** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## From Experiment to Reproducible Pipeline

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/16-scaling-deployment-and-responsible-use.qmd#sec-pr-16-from-experiment-to-reproducible-pipeline)
to turn **From Experiment to Reproducible Pipeline** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Deployment, Monitoring, and Drift

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/16-scaling-deployment-and-responsible-use.qmd#sec-pr-16-deployment-monitoring-and-drift)
to turn **Deployment, Monitoring, and Drift** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Privacy, Security, and Misuse

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/16-scaling-deployment-and-responsible-use.qmd#sec-pr-16-privacy-security-and-misuse)
to turn **Privacy, Security, and Misuse** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Energy, Sustainability, and Proportionality

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/16-scaling-deployment-and-responsible-use.qmd#sec-pr-16-energy-sustainability-and-proportionality)
to turn **Energy, Sustainability, and Proportionality** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Responsible Decisions and Human Oversight

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/16-scaling-deployment-and-responsible-use.qmd#sec-pr-16-responsible-decisions-and-human-oversight)
to turn **Responsible Decisions and Human Oversight** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Summary and Exercises
